caption: A screen recording captures a live stream layout featuring a man with a beard wearing a black shirt, positioned in a webcam overlay at the bottom right. The main screen displays a web browser navigating the website "RANDOM.ORG," specifically the "List Randomizer" tool. A list of names, including "Ryan Presnell" and "Carl Hagedorn," is processed to be put in random order. To the right of the main window, a chat feed shows messages from "glowbug27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" posting a link: "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2Z6ebsK9". A logo for "JASPY'S CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible at the bottom. As the sequence progresses, the user transitions from the randomizer results page to a Google Sheets spreadsheet where the randomized list of names is pasted into a column.
